hero.headline: Know what your competitors are doing —
hero.subheadline: One platform to track campaigns, decode strategies, and surface competitive signals automatically — before they impact your business.

typewriter: in real time, every single day

problem.headline: Your competitors are moving fast.
problem.card1Desc: Competitor campaigns sit across inboxes, spreadsheets, and tools. No central view of what's happening in the market.
problem.card2Desc: Reading every competitor email, comparing it to last month, spotting changes — it's a full-time job nobody has time for.
problem.card3Desc: A pricing change, a new campaign, a messaging shift. By the time you notice, you're reacting — not leading.

solution.headline: Automate competitive intelligence.
solution.headlineSub: Focus on strategy, not data collection.
solution.desc: Tracklyze connects to your data sources, monitors competitor activity continuously, and uses AI to surface the signals that actually matter to your business.
solution.card1Desc: All competitor communications, campaigns, and signals in one searchable, organized platform. No more scattered tracking.
solution.card2Desc: Advanced models extract pricing signals, promotional strategies, messaging angles, and competitive positioning — automatically.
solution.card3Desc: Get alerts when competitors make moves. Receive AI-generated recommendations your team can act on immediately.

howItWorks.headline: From setup to competitive advantage in minutes
howItWorks.desc: No complex configuration. Connect your sources, add competitors, and let the AI do the rest.
howItWorks.step1Desc: One-click OAuth for data sources. Read-only access. We never send, delete, or modify anything.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add competitor names and domains. Tracklyze automatically matches and classifies incoming data.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Every piece of competitor activity is analyzed for pricing, offers, CTAs, messaging patterns, and strategy.
howItWorks.step4Desc: View dashboards, set custom alerts, and use strategic insights to stay ahead of the competition.

platform.headline: Everything you need to outsmart the competition
platform.desc: From automated collection to strategic recommendations — one platform replaces hours of manual competitive research.
platform.feature1Desc: Every competitor campaign, promotion, and communication — organized, searchable, and classified automatically. Stop switching between tools and inboxes to understand what your competitors are doing.
platform.feature1Bullet1: Automatic data collection from connected sources
platform.feature1Bullet2: Smart classification by competitor and campaign type
platform.feature1Bullet3: Full-text search across all competitor content
platform.feature1Bullet4: Clean reader view with AI annotations
platform.feature2Headline: Turn competitor activity into actionable insights
platform.feature2Desc: AI doesn't just summarize — it extracts structured intelligence. Pricing changes, promotional patterns, messaging strategies, and competitive positioning are identified and scored with confidence levels.
platform.feature2Bullet4: Confidence scores on every data point
platform.feature3Desc: Set custom alert rules based on what matters to your strategy — pricing shifts, new campaign launches, keyword mentions, or competitor activity spikes. AI synthesizes patterns into strategic recommendations.
platform.feature3Bullet1: Custom rules: price drops, keywords, new campaigns
platform.miniFeature1Desc: Visualize campaign frequency, promotion patterns, and competitor strategy shifts over time.
platform.miniFeature2Desc: Invite your team with Admin, Analyst, or Viewer roles. Full audit trail on every action.
platform.miniFeature3Desc: Read-only data access, encryption at rest, role-based permissions, and full data isolation.
platform.miniFeature4Desc: Analyze competitor ad creative and targeting from Meta's Ad Library.
platform.alertMedium: New campaign detected from Competitor B
platform.alertLow: Messaging shift in Competitor C emails

socialProof.headline: Built for teams that compete on intelligence
socialProof.quote1: We finally have a single source of truth for everything our competitors are doing. The AI extraction saves us hours every week.
socialProof.quote2: The alerts caught a competitor's pricing change 48 hours before our team would have noticed. That alone justified the investment.
socialProof.quote3: What used to take a full-time analyst now runs automatically. The insights are structured, actionable, and always up to date.
socialProof.disclaimer: Representative feedback from beta users. Named testimonials coming post-launch.

pricing.headline: Start free. Scale as your intelligence needs grow.
pricing.desc: Every plan includes core intelligence features. Upgrade for deeper analysis, more competitors, and team collaboration.
pricing.adIntelligenceNote: ✦ Ad Intelligence — coming soon exclusively on Premium
pricing.freeDesc: Explore competitive intelligence with core features
pricing.starterDesc: For teams actively monitoring the competitive landscape
pricing.premiumDesc: Full strategic intelligence for competitive teams

faq.headline: Common questions
faq.q1: What data sources does Tracklyze support?
faq.a1: Currently, Tracklyze supports Gmail OAuth for automated collection of competitor communications. You can also manually import any competitor content. We're expanding to additional data sources in upcoming releases.
faq.a2: Yes. We request read-only access and never modify, delete, or send anything on your behalf. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Each workspace is fully isolated. You can disconnect sources anytime.
faq.q3: How does the AI analysis work?
faq.a3: Advanced language models extract structured intelligence from competitor content — pricing signals, promotions, CTAs, messaging angles, and campaign patterns. Each insight includes a confidence score so you know how reliable it is.
faq.q4: What makes this different from doing it manually?
faq.a4: Manual tracking doesn't scale. Tracklyze automatically collects, classifies, and analyzes every competitor communication. It detects patterns over time, surfaces pricing changes, and generates strategic recommendations — things you'd miss tracking one piece at a time.
faq.q5: Can I use it without connecting external sources?
faq.a5: Absolutely. You can paste competitor content directly for instant analysis. Source integrations just automate the collection process.
faq.a6: An upcoming Premium feature that will analyze competitor ad creative and targeting from Meta's Ad Library. It's currently in development — we'll announce when it launches.
faq.q7: How many people can use one workspace?
faq.a7: Free includes 1 user. Starter includes 3 team members. Premium includes 10. Each user gets role-based access (Admin, Analyst, or Viewer).
faq.a8: Yes. All plans are month-to-month. No contracts, no commitments. Your data remains accessible until the end of your billing period.

finalCta.headline: Stop tracking competitors manually.
finalCta.desc: Join teams using Tracklyze to automate competitive intelligence and make faster, smarter marketing decisions.

footer.tagline: AI-powered competitor intelligence platform for marketing and growth teams. Monitor campaigns, extract insights, make better decisions.
